title: Impatience please dont kill me
wikitext:
[]: Impatience please don't kill me             Quote Post by Flyingtothemoon » Mon Jul 04, 2016 2:50 pm Hello everybody ! I am new on this forum because I would want to have an answer to a very precise question : For several years I look forward to the release of the latest film of Neon Genesis Evangelion 4.0, without having provided new on progress. Somebody would have you he in source safe of useful information concerning this movie ? Thank you in advance ... (Sorry for my bad English)

[]: Re: Impatience please don't kill me             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Jul 04, 2016 2:59 pm Check out various threads in this part of the forum which discuss the matter (some locked because they got too repetitive!).

[]: Re: Impatience please don't kill me             Quote Post by Flyingtothemoon » Mon Jul 04, 2016 3:04 pm Ok thanks !
